topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Test Case Design. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for QA Engineer roles.
whyItMatters: Test Case Design is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing Test Case Design in a real-world scenario
Handling edge cases in Test Case Design

interviewQuestions: Explain Test Case Design to a 5-year-old.
